'''Dorande''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Dorande (species)|Dorande]] race, who tried to conquer the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[R-Duba]]. This plan was foiled by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], however.

It was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' (1986) 5]] {{1stm}}
